arts.ttl: Man United attacker Antony's agent hits back at Ruben Amorim's claims regarding forward's Old Trafford struggles
arts.sum: Manchester United attacker Antony's agent 'completely disagrees' with the claims of Red Devils head coach Ruben Amorim when it comes to his client's Old Trafford struggles.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, Man United 'suffer major blow' in pursuit of highly-rated centre-back
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly confident of keeping Jarrad Branthwaite at the club this summer amid talk of interest from Real Madrid and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Benfica star snubs Man United interest despite tempting transfer clause amid Ruben Amorim's summer signing plans
arts.sum: The 21-year-old enjoys a breakthrough season in Portugal, emerging as a strong starter for the silver medal holders.

arts.ttl: Premier League 'confirm' Man United decision stance after controversial VAR call
arts.sum: Manchester United were involved in a controversial VAR storm last month when they travelled to Everton in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Sociedad vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Real Sociedad and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man United leave FIVE Europa League squad spots empty for clash with Real Sociedad as Ruben Amorim continues to battle injury issues
arts.sum: United are looking to salvage something from what has been a dismal season, which has seen them linger in the bottom half of the Premier League and out of both the Carabao and FA Cups.

arts.ttl: Premier League panel reach verdict on VAR decision to cancel Everton penalty vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Everton thought they'd been awarded a late penalty against Manchester United recently before VAR intervened and an independent panel believes the intervention was correct

arts.ttl: Manchester United fans are all making the same point after Arsenal run riot at PSV in Champions League
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to host Arsenal in the Premier League this Sunday, but first the Red Devils will be in Europa League action against...

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba fires cryptic three-word message amid Man United transfer warning
arts.sum: Ex-Manchester United midfielder Paul Pogba has been pictured training as he continues his search for a new club.

arts.ttl: Man Utd handed new double injury blow before Europa League knockout tie
arts.sum: Manchester United's injury crisis worsens at just the wrong time - the Red Devils head to Spain on Thursday to play Real Sociedad in the Europa League.
